headline: Molson Coors: Undervalued Beer Powerhouse With Double-Digit Yield Working On Their Turnaround
summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company (TAP) remains a Buy, supported by resilient cash flow, a healthy balance sheet, and a compelling double-digit total yield.
